fields.name: fsda
fields.fieldText: Please check the details below are accurate, any details that are amended will only be reflected on the interview email sent.

fields.name: Confirm
fields.fieldText:
Candidate Details

Name: {!Get_Candidate.Name}

Email: {!Get_Candidate.Email}


Interview Details

Interview Calendar: {!Calender_Choice.value}

Interview Start Date/Time: {!Start}

Interview Duration: {!Duration}

Interviewer: {!Get_Contact.Name}

Interviewer Email: {!Get_Contact.Email}

Notes:

{!Interview_Notes}

value.stringValue: Upload any files you want to go to the candidate

fields.name: test
fields.fieldText:
Alert!

Candidate has no email so no interview emails can be sent

fields.name: Display1
fields.fieldText: You are currently sending an interview email for the candidate: {!Get_Candidate.Name}, in relation to the job: {!Get_Application.ts2__Job__r.Name}.

value.stringValue: Which calendar do you want this interview assigned to?

fields.name: Start
fields.fieldText: What time is the interview scheduled to start?

value.stringValue: Who is the interview with? (Client email will be sent to this contact)
Ensure there is a contact record against the account
If you want to copy in another email for the Client Email enter it below:
If you want to copy in another email for the Candidate Email enter it below:

fields.name: Interview_Notes
fields.fieldText: Are there any notes for the candidate?
fields.helpText: This will be included on the email confirmation

fields.name: Success2
fields.fieldText: Email confirmation has been sent successfully, you can now close this window.

textTemplates.name: CandidateBody
textTemplates.text:
Hi {!Get_Candidate.FirstName}

Please see below your interview confirmation with {!Interview_Company_Name}.

{!Interview_Notes}

Interview Details

Job Title: {!Job_Title}

Job Description:

{!Job_Description_Input.value}

Date and Time: {!Start}

Duration: {!Duration}

Interviewer:

{!Get_Contact.Name}

{!Get_Contact.IP_JobTitle__c}

Company Details

Company Name: {!Interview_Company_Name}

Address:

{!Address.street}

{!Address.city}

{!Address.province}

{!Address.postalCode}

Website: {!Website}

Telephone: {!Telephone}

What happens next?

  • Please confirm attendance by replying to this email
  • We will call you before the interview to wish you good luck
  • We will call you after the interview to gain your feedback
  • We will call the client to seek their feedback
  • If you have to cancel please call us immediately, any no shows will be recorded and we will not offer any more interviews.

Top Tips about doing well in an interview and/or trial

  • Always aim to arrive 10 minutes early
  • Always go smartly dressed and of good appearance
  • Always research the company by visiting their website
  • Prepare some questions to ask the interviewer
  • On a trial, always ask what would you like me to do next and act keen
  • Ask at the end of the interview/trial – what is the next step?

Please reply to this email to confirm that you will be attending the interview 

Good Luck!

{!$User.FirstName} {!$User.LastName}

{!$UserRole.Name}

textTemplates.name: ClientBody
textTemplates.text:
Hi {!Get_Contact.FirstName}

{!Get_Candidate.Name} is confirmed for their interview on {!Start}

Please let us know your feedback

Thanks

{!$User.FirstName} {!$User.LastName}

{!$UserRole.Name}
